label: Garden AI improvements
items: Every answer now follows a clear, consistent layout — the direct answer first, labelled bullet points for detail, then what was checked (🔎), what's ready to confirm (🔧) and one suggested next step (→).

Ask it to set something up and it fills in sensible defaults from your garden instead of quizzing you, chains multi-step requests properly, and refining a pending action ('actually only the greenhouse ones') just works.
Sensor questions now quote your actual soil readings, and staged actions always explain themselves — no more bare "I need a quick confirmation" replies or broken confirmation cards.
